LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC WITHDREW ITS OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: IRENE TOFFT, CSR # 12313

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment is GRANTED. Respondent Jook House Entertainment, LLC withdrew its opposition to the petition. Moving party to prepare form of order and judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hk
